transcript.text:
(As mentioned in the last video...) There's a famous restaurant called 'Chowon' nearby
(Famous beef tongue restaurant...?) They're known for their beef tongue
(Famous beef tongue restaurant...?) I'm gonna go there
(She's really here) (Gonna eat beef tongue today!)
(But...)
(But.. all these people are waiting?!)
How tasty is beef tongue for all these people to be waiting in line?!
(Hehe, are you curious about me...?) This is beef tongue
(Have a bite)
Mm!
What's this?
It's a whole new world!
It's delicious..!!!
(Is there only beef tongue today..?)
(Sirloin)
(Chuck flap tail)

(Top blade)
(4 cuts of beef today....!)
(This is crazy...!)
(There was a reason why people were waiting...) Wow, I know why people say beef tongue is delicious
(A street under the darkness..)
Hello, everyone
I'm here at Namyeong-dong today
Today, I'm here to have some meat
But this place is famous
for 'beef tongue', not just your typical meat cuts
('Booking' automatically shows up as a related keyword...) I wonder how delicious it will be
('Booking' automatically shows up as a related keyword...) because I heard this place is a popular place!
('Chowon', Yongsan-gu, Seoul)
(It's crowded with people waiting outside...!)
There are so many customers
(I...)

I booked a table in advance
It's gonna be so delicious
(Entered quickly)
Wow, it's like a room
inside
(Hi, grandma...?) It kinda has a grandma house vibe
Wow, the menu!
(Scanning the menu!) Oh! There are a bunch of stuff
(PD Tzuyang's passion LOL) Marinated Korean beef sirloin, marinated top blade
(Big eating show is coming up!) Marinated chuck flap tail? I should try them all!
(Today's main) Beef tongue! This is the most famous here
Beef stomach sounds so tempting as well!
Should I try them all?
(Do whatever you want...) Excuse me
Can I get 4 servings of these each
A total of 16 servings

And one doenjang-jjigae and one fried rice
I'm so excited!
If it says marinated beef, is it seasoned?
I'm curious about how it's served
(Charcoal fire first...) Thank you, it's warm!
(Charcoal fire first...) It's so warm
(The meat is here) Thank you, amazing!
Chuck flap and then top blade....
(It's never-ending...) There's so much!
(Table limit exceeded) Where should I put doenjang-jjigae and fried rice?
(In a pickle...) What should I do?
(In a pickle...) There's no room
(Cramming it)
The doenjang-jjigae
(Please remember me..) is over there! I can't even see it
The marbling... It's no joke

(So busy with taking photos LOL) Look at all these marbling!
(Oh my.. This is real...) Zooming in!
It said marinated
so I expected something like the marinated grilled duck we're familiar with
(Unbelievable marbling..!) It's just like steak, but with a bit of seasoning
This is the sirloin
This is the chuck flap
and top blade
And this is beef tongue!
(Chowon is already famous for their beef tongue!) Do I just grill the beef tongue?
(Chowon is already famous for their beef tongue!) Do I have to cook it all the way?
(Recommendation) You can have it medium rare!
Thank you
Their beef tongue is super famous here
What should I start with?
Just sirloin?

It's rapidly frozen beef!
A bite of the fried rice!
Delicious
I can smell green onion and onion very strongly
The fried rice is so delicious! Really!
(Clap!!)
Amazing
This is shepherd's purse!
(It's old-school style doenjang-jjigae with shepherd's purse!)
The shepherd's purse flavor
and the doenjang-jjigae itself is very deep and tasty
(I love this doenjang-jjigae...!) This is the real barbecue doenjang-jjigae!
Sirloin!
Dipped slightly in salt...!
The texture is really nice
(On top of fried rice!) I'll put the meat on here

And it tastes very clean for sirloin
Should I try it with this too?
What kind of sauce is this?
It's delicious...!
Shall I start grilling the next one?
Since they said chuck flap tail is popular,
I'll start with chuck flap tail first!
It looks just like.. Right
(It looks just like Italian sausage!) You know 'salami', right? It looks just like that
(Looks amazing..!) It kinda looks like sausage! So interesting!
It's very savory for sirloin
I'll dip it in the sauce here
(Eating it with the fried rice...!)
(Come home with me...) I want to get this bean paste, it's so delicious!
(Cute chuck flap tail, haha) The chuck flap tail is very round and it curves up like this
It's definitely delicious!

(Chuck flap tail lover) I actually like chuck flap tail
(The oily flavor of chuck flap tail is amazing!) because of its oily flavor
(The oily flavor of chuck flap tail is amazing!) It's one of my favorite dishes
(The oily flavor of chuck flap tail is amazing!) It's so delicious!
But it's definitely
less oily here, is it because it's marinated?
It's so juicy!
(Stretching her arm all the way!)
This doenjang-jjigae is the best of all...!
If you don't eat it, you'll regret it big time! It's so delicious!
Shall I try some beef tongue now?
(The signature of 'Chowon') It's their main signature dish!
They said I should grill it crispy outside and juicy inside!
(Targeting the fried rice & fried egg while grilling the beef tongue...!)
(Her arm is working so hard today...!)
I'll move these here

(Don't have to stretch the arm too far anymore...)
Shall I cut the beef tongue now?
They told me to cut it perpendicular to the layer
Wow! It's so... How should I say this?
It's not chewy but...
it's like crunchy?
(She's a grilling expert...)
This is the beef tongue!
(It is the best!) Wow, no wonder why people said it's good!
It's so good!
(A loss for chuck flap tail...) It's even better than the chuck flap tail
What is this?!
It's a whole new world!
The texture is totally different from regular beef!
It's almost like mushroom
but it's got so much juice inside

and most importantly, it doesn't have any smell!!
(Another loss for chuck flap tail...) It's way better than the chuck flap tail
(Falling in love with beef tongue..) I can't believe it's this delicious!
It's got a combined texture of beef stomach and mushroom
I love beef stomach
(This is even better) so it's perfect for my taste!
(Please don't say it's cow tongue...) Who will think this is cow tongue?
I'll try top blade as well
(You're just beautiful, my love...)
Frozen pork belly got its own charm, right?
I think this one shares that charm
It's like pork belly!
It's delicious!
(Top blade is the best now...?) I think it's the best among all the meat!
It's very flavorful
(Another loss for chuck flap tail and a loss for sirloin...) I think it's better than sirloin and chuck flap tail

It's so good!
(Sirloin line-up)
(She's going non-stop!)
(Swoosh)
The fried rice became my serving plate
This is good as a wrap
(Today's best combo...!) With meat!
Oh so delicious
Chuck flap
(Can't stop the flow of the meat..)
Can I grill it just like this?
(Roughly)
(Say sorry to the meat!)
My aunt and uncle-in-law owns a butcher shop
(We're beyond the experts...!) I once saw them grilling beef like pork belly so I was so shocked
(You can do anything you want, Tzuyang..) Since it's marinated meat, I'll try it like this

(Feeling a bit off as well) This doesn't look so right for the beef..
It's cooked very fast
(Very excited) What if it turns out so much better?!
What?!
Why is it so good?!
(My girl finally learned something from us..) Wow, it's like bulgogi!
It's so smoky after all! LOL
Just put sirloin like this as well...
(Stack 'em up!)
It's not because I'm lazy to grill them
(Confession) Actually, I am
(Right, she's grilling so much...) I feel so lazy to grill right now
(It's an intense arm workout...) My arm feels sore
(She's grilling a whole platoon portion of beef...)
(Finished grilling)
The sirloin....

is better when it's fully cooked haha
(Let's promise to grill fully for sirloin..) Let's not grill it like this ever
They warmed up the jjigae again
Do they use their own soybean paste?
Do they buy it?
Wow.. It's amazing
(Vroom.. Vroom..)
Ranking
Among the meat, beef tongue is in 1st place
Is top blade 2nd or the chuck flap 2nd...?
1st is beef tongue, 2nd is top blade
3rd is chuck flap, 4th is sirloin
(Respect personal preferences!) It's my personal taste
(Tends to eat delicious food last) Should I eat the beef tongue last? It's so delicious
(Changed her mind) I'll eat a bit more
(It still looks fantastic...)

Gasp... Wow....
Look at the oil
Since I kept placing the meat here,
it became oil fried rice
(That's even better) It's tasty
(After grilling the meat....)
(More meat goes on....)
(Focused to the MAX)
(You've learned well, my niece) I grilled it like my aunt
When I wrap it with this when it feels a bit greasy, it doesn't taste greasy at all
Is it some kind of pickled cabbage?
(This is Auntie style..!)
(Speed up!)
Break the tofu!
When I come here again, I'll definitely
eat beef tongue

and easily finish
about 3 bowls of doenjang-jjigae
(She wants to heat up the fried rice) Will it heat up?
Oh, it's hot!
(She wants to cool it down now) I'll take it out right away
(Let's grill beef tongue again!) I should grill more beef tongue now
(Oh, nice plating..!)
(Satisfied)
Dip and nom!
Zero greasiness!
It tastes similar to beef
(Never tried this texture before) But the texture is totally different..!
(Never tried this texture before) I've never tried this texture before!
(It's only her and beef tongue in this table..)
Whoa!
(Too much oil!) There is so much oil here right now...!

(Strong rejection) I don't think I can eat it either
Cleansing it with the doenjang-jjigae!
(Namyeong-dong 'Chowon' easily CLEAR!)
(Look at all these Coke cans..!) Actually, I've never been a fan of beef tongue
(The best beef tongue ever..!) I've never had beef tongue
(The best beef tongue ever..!) this delicious with such a nice texture like this!
I enjoyed the meal today as well!
